summary: Iteration 26: BYOI Provider Key Management Bug Fix Verified. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Genesis screen shows provider selector with Conway Cloud and Fly.io options, Fly.io Account panel displays Connected status with key prefix when key exists.
critical_code_review_comments: provision.py: _get_fly_config() correctly reads Fly API key from agent's MongoDB document, falls back to env var
provision.py: provider-key-status endpoint returns configured=true, key_prefix, and app_name for Fly provider
provision.py: set-provider-key endpoint correctly strips 'FlyV1 ' prefix from pasted keys
provision.py: set-provider-key validates empty keys and returns 400 error
provision.py: Per-agent key isolation working - each agent stores its own fly_api_key in MongoDB
App.js: Provider selector UI shows Conway Cloud and Fly.io options
App.js: Fly.io Account panel shows Connected status when key exists, with app_name and key_prefix

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Genesis screen, provider selector, Fly.io panel all working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test agents created and deleted during tests (TEST_fly_prefix_test_*, TEST_conway_key_test_*, TEST_agent_a_*, TEST_agent_b_*, TEST_Fly_Workflow_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the BYOI (Bring Your Own Infrastructure) bug fix for Fly.io. The 5 missing endpoints have been added to provision.py and are working: provider-key-status, set-provider-key, health-check, reset-sandbox, delete-sandbox. Per-agent key isolation is working - each agent stores its own fly_api_key in MongoDB. Frontend shows provider selector with Conway Cloud and Fly.io options. Fly.io Account panel shows Connected status when key exists.
tested_api_endpoints: POST /api/provision/set-provider-key (fly, empty key) - returns 400 'API key cannot be empty'
POST /api/provision/set-provider-key (fly, FlyV1 prefix) - strips prefix and stores key
POST /api/provision/set-provider-key (conway) - stores Conway key for agent
POST /api/provision/health-check - returns success=false when no sandbox
POST /api/provision/reset-sandbox - returns error when no sandbox
POST /api/provision/delete-sandbox - returns error when no sandbox
POST /api/agents/{id}/select - 200 for valid agent, 404 for nonexistent
tested_ui_features: Genesis screen loads with agent switcher bar
Infrastructure Provider selector shows Conway Cloud and Fly.io options
Clicking Fly.io shows Fly.io Account panel
Fly.io Account panel shows Connected status when key exists
Fly.io Account panel shows app_name (animafund) and key_prefix (fm2_lJPECAAA...)
Conway Account panel shows Connected status with balance and key_prefix
Select VM section shows all 5 tiers
Provision Agent stepper with Run All button

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: It fails when adding a new fly api key for a new agent
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: 5 missing backend endpoints that frontend was calling
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added provider-key-status, set-provider-key, health-check, reset-sandbox, delete-sandbox endpoints to provision.py
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All endpoints working, per-agent key isolation confirmed, frontend UI working
